allow: Bash(rm -f security_review_report.md ITERATION_REPORT.md accessibility-audit-report.md api_test_report.md design_consistency_report.md iteration_completion_report.md tonghua-project-plan.md && ls -la *.md 2>/dev/null || echo "Root md files cleaned")

Bash(cd "/Users/yanghaoze/Desktop/PROJECT/tonghua-project/tonghua-project/frontend/web-react" && node -e "require\('typescript'\).createProgram\(['src/components/scroll/ScrollNarrative.tsx'], {compilerOptions: {jsx: 3, target: 99}}\).getSemanticDiagnostics\(\)" 2>&1 | head -20 || echo "TypeScript check not available, checking syntax with node...")
Bash(node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -c "error" || echo "No errors found")

Bash(PEW=~/.cursor/worktrees/tonghua-project/pew
cp "$PEW/tonghua-project/frontend/web-react/src/services/clothingDonations.ts" tonghua-project/frontend/web-react/src/services/
cp "$PEW/tonghua-project/frontend/web-react/src/services/reviews.ts" tonghua-project/frontend/web-react/src/services/
echo "Additional services copied from pew")
Bash(cd tonghua-project/backend && python -m alembic upgrade head 2>&1)
Bash(cd tonghua-project/backend && pip3 show alembic 2>&1 || pip show alembic 2>&1)
Bash(cd tonghua-project/deploy/docker && docker compose run --rm backend python -m alembic upgrade head 2>&1)
Bash(cd tonghua-project/backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install alembic pymysql 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gradle/gradle/v8.5.0/gradlew -o gradlew && chmod +x gradlew && echo "Downloaded gradlew")

Bash(pkill -f "kotlin-daemon" 2>/dev/null; export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" && ./gradlew --stop 2>&1; rm -rf ~/.gradle/caches/modules-2/files-2.17/org.jetbrains.kotlin/kotlin-compiler-embeddable/ 2>/dev/null; ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -100)
